emails.subject: Shut-in of #986315
emails.body: Shut-in of #986315 Meter 0986315 Shawnee Spring Common Point was shut-in on 6/13/2000 due to high dew point. Repeated attempts by the pumper to dry out the gas have failed. The meter will remain shut-in until the dew point is within pipeline quality specs. Gary H. Forwarded by Gary A Hanks/HOU/ECT on 06/15/2000 10:47 AM From: Sean J Smith 06/14/2000 05:55 PM

emails.subject: Re: Shut-in of #986315
emails.body: Re: Shut-in of #986315 FYI We don't have any active contracts behind this meter. There was a dedicated reserves purchase contract with Phoenix Gas Pipeline Company that terminated 7/31/99. There was also a GTC 1st Purchaser/Marketer with El Sordo Gathering Systems, Inc. which expired 8/1/99. If you are aware of any other contract that we don't reflect in the Global Contracts database, please let me know. Otherwise, there isn't any action that my group needs to take regarding this shut-in. Enron North America Corp. From: Gary A Hanks 06/15/2000 11:18 AM
